cases.title: Events list page 2 returns correct slice with total and totalPages
preconditions: At least 13 published events visible to the requesting actor (more than default pageSize of 12)
Authenticated participant or public access per GET /events visibility rules
steps: GET /api/v1/events?page=1&pageSize=12&sort=startAt:asc and record total and totalPages
Compare page-2 items to the expected second slice ordered by startAt ascending
cases.expected: HTTP 200; page-2 response has page=2, pageSize=12, total matching page-1 total, totalPages=ceil(total/12), items.length <= 12, and items are the correct contiguous slice per testing plan scenario matrix

cases.title: Event registrations list returns paginated envelope with default sort
preconditions: Event with multiple registrations in varied states
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
steps: Inspect response envelope fields and items ordering
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items, page=1, pageSize=20, total, totalPages; items sorted by updatedAt descending per API design default; total reflects all matching registrations before paging

cases.title: My registrations list returns paginated participant registrations
preconditions: Participant with registrations across at least two events
Authenticated participant JWT
steps: Verify each item includes registrationId, eventId, eventName, state, and updatedAt
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items contain only current actor's registrations; total and totalPages match row count; default sort updatedAt:desc applied

cases.title: Audit logs list returns ordered paginated rows with total count
preconditions: Event with multiple audit log entries from critical config changes
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: HTTP 200; items ordered by createdAt descending; total equals full matching audit row count; totalPages computed correctly per testing plan audit logs paginated scenario

cases.title: Waitlist list returns paginated entries ordered by position
preconditions: Full event with waitlist enabled and multiple Waitlisted participants
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items sorted by position ascending; total reflects waitlist queue length

cases.title: Attendance list returns paginated check-in rows
preconditions: Event with multiple recorded check-ins
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin or OrganizerStaff with event scope
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items sorted by checkinAt descending; total matches attendance row count

cases.title: Status history list returns paginated transition records
preconditions: Event with registration status changes recorded in status history
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; items sorted by createdAt descending; total reflects all history rows for the event scope

cases.title: Eligibility list returns paginated envelope with default sort
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility rows
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items, page, pageSize, total, totalPages; items sorted by participantId ascending per endpoint default

cases.title: Paginated list endpoints share consistent envelope shape
preconditions: Seeded data covering events, registrations, waitlist, attendance, eligibility, audit-logs, status-history, and me/registrations
Valid JWT tokens for participant and organizer actors
steps: Issue paginated GET requests to each documented list endpoint with page=1 and endpoint default pageSize
Assert each response body contains items (array), page, pageSize, total, and totalPages
cases.expected: All eight paginated endpoints return the same envelope structure defined in API design section 3; no bare array responses

cases.title: Page beyond totalPages returns empty items with valid metadata
preconditions: Paginated list endpoint with known total row count (e.g. GET /events with total <= 12)
Valid authentication where required
steps: GET list endpoint with page=1 and pageSize=20; record total and totalPages
GET same endpoint with page=totalPages+1 and same pageSize
cases.expected: HTTP 200; beyond-last-page response has items: [], page equals requested page, pageSize unchanged, total and totalPages match page-1 metadata per AC-13 and API design section 3

cases.title: Invalid pagination parameters return 400 INVALID_PAGINATION
preconditions: Any paginated list endpoint accessible to authenticated actor
Valid JWT where endpoint requires auth
cases.expected: Each invalid request returns HTTP 400 with error.code INVALID_PAGINATION for non-integer, page < 1, or pageSize above max (100) per API design validation rules

cases.title: Registrations list never returns more than pageSize items
preconditions: Event with total registrations exceeding configured pageSize (e.g. 25 rows, pageSize=20)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: Page 1 items.length=20; page 2 items.length=5; neither page exceeds pageSize; total=25 and totalPages=2 per testing plan registrations list beyond capacity scenario

cases.title: totalPages uses ceiling division when total is not divisible by pageSize
preconditions: List endpoint with exactly total=25 rows available
pageSize=20
steps: Request page=1 with pageSize=20 and read totalPages
Request page=2 and verify non-empty items
cases.expected: totalPages=2 (ceil(25/20)); page 2 contains remaining 5 items; metadata consistent across both pages

cases.title: totalPages is 1 when total is zero
preconditions: Event with no registrations (or empty result set after filters)
Authenticated OrganizerAdmin with event scope
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with items: [], total=0, totalPages=1 (or consistent zero-total convention), page=1, pageSize=20

cases.title: Omitted page and pageSize use endpoint defaults
preconditions: GET /events accessible with sufficient seeded events
Valid auth if required
steps: GET /api/v1/events without page or pageSize query parameters
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with page=1, pageSize=12 (events endpoint default), and correctly paginated first slice

cases.title: Events list pagination respects optional q and state filters in total count
preconditions: Mixed event catalog with searchable names and varied states
Authenticated actor with list visibility
cases.expected: total and totalPages reflect only rows matching q and state filters; items.length <= pageSize; filtered pagination metadata is internally consistent

cases.title: Paginated list returns single page within acceptable time when total exceeds 500 rows
preconditions: Database seeded with >500 rows for a paginated endpoint (e.g. audit-logs or registrations)
OrganizerAdmin actor with event scope
Test environment uses fixed clock and deterministic fixtures per testing plan section 7
steps: GET paginated list with page=1 and pageSize=20
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with exactly one page of items (length <= pageSize); response completes within acceptable latency threshold per NFR-16; total reflects full matching row count without loading all rows into the response body

cases.title: total and totalPages remain stable across sequential page requests
preconditions: List endpoint with at least three pages of data at pageSize=10
Authenticated actor with list access
steps: GET page=1, page=2, and page=3 with pageSize=10
Compare total and totalPages on each response
cases.expected: total and totalPages are identical on every page; only items array differs between pages; supports reliable client-side pagination controls

cases.title: Pagination query validator rejects out-of-range page and pageSize
preconditions: Unit test harness for pagination input validation module
steps: Validate page=0, page=-1, pageSize=0, pageSize=101, and non-numeric strings
Validate page=1, pageSize=100 as acceptable inputs
cases.expected: Invalid inputs produce validation failure mapped to INVALID_PAGINATION; valid boundary inputs (page=1, pageSize=100) pass validation per API design guardrails

cases.title: Pagination envelope builder computes totalPages as ceil(total/pageSize)
preconditions: Pure function or mapper that builds paginated response envelope from items, page, pageSize, and total
cases.expected: totalPages=1 when total=0; totalPages=2 when total=25; totalPages=2 when total=40; page and pageSize echoed correctly in envelope
